title: Unleashing Your Inner Sales Warrior With Jason Forrest
summary: Jason Forrest, CEO of Forrest Performance Group, on the psychology of high-performance selling: what separates the top 1% of salespeople, and how to build that into your team.
full_content_text: Jason Forrest, CEO of Forrest Performance Group, on the psychology of high-performance selling: what separates the top 1% of salespeople, and how to build that into your team.
